languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

languages.text: "И правда, любопытный вопрос с точки зрения анатомии. Ваш живой интерес, пример для подражания, госпожа Хейдари! Рассчитываю, что вы подробно задокументируете находки и поделитесь ими со мной. Что? Нунциус, брось эти отвратительные инсинуации!"

"A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

"A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

"A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

languages.text: «Una pregunta fascinante, sin duda, desde el punto de vista anatómico. ¡Ojalá todo el mundo compartiera su interés erudito, señora Heydari! Confío en que registrará cualquier descubrimiento en detalle y lo compartirá conmigo. ¿Qué? ¡Nuncius, basta de insinuaciones espantosas!».
languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

traits.locale_text: «Una pregunta fascinante, sin duda, desde el punto de vista anatómico. ¡Ojalá todo el mundo compartiera su interés erudito, señora Heydari! Confío en que registrará cualquier descubrimiento en detalle y lo compartirá conmigo. ¿Qué? ¡Nuncius, basta de insinuaciones espantosas!».

languages.text: 「解剖学的観点から見て、実に魅力的な問いです。誰もがあなたほどの学究的関心を共有してくれればよいのですが、ヘイダリ女史！ 何か知見が得られたなら、詳細に記録し、私と共有してくださると信じています。何ですって？ ヌンキウス、その忌まわしいほのめかしはもうやめなさい！」
languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

traits.locale_text: 「解剖学的観点から見て、実に魅力的な問いです。誰もがあなたほどの学究的関心を共有してくれればよいのですが、ヘイダリ女史！ 何か知見が得られたなら、詳細に記録し、私と共有してくださると信じています。何ですって？ ヌンキウス、その忌まわしいほのめかしはもうやめなさい！」

languages.text: “从解剖学角度来看，这的确是个引人入胜的问题。要是人人都像你一样有学术热忱就好了，海达利女士。我相信，你一定会详细记录任何发现并与我进行分享。什么？努恩修斯，收起你那令人憎恶的含沙射影！”
languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

traits.locale_text: “从解剖学角度来看，这的确是个引人入胜的问题。要是人人都像你一样有学术热忱就好了，海达利女士。我相信，你一定会详细记录任何发现并与我进行分享。什么？努恩修斯，收起你那令人憎恶的含沙射影！”

languages.text: "Eine faszinierende Frage, in der Tat, aus anatomischer Sicht. Hätten doch alle Euer wissenschaftliches Interesse, Meisterin Heydari! Ich hoffe, Ihr werdet alle Funde detailliert aufzeichnen und mit mir teilen. Was? Nuncius, Schluss mit Euren abscheulichen Anspielungen!"
languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

traits.locale_text: "Eine faszinierende Frage, in der Tat, aus anatomischer Sicht. Hätten doch alle Euer wissenschaftliches Interesse, Meisterin Heydari! Ich hoffe, Ihr werdet alle Funde detailliert aufzeichnen und mit mir teilen. Was? Nuncius, Schluss mit Euren abscheulichen Anspielungen!"

languages.text: « J'en conviens, c'est une question fascinante d'un point de vue anatomique. Si seulement tout le monde partageait votre soif de connaissance, maîtresse Heydari ! Je compte sur vous pour documenter toute nouvelle trouvaille et pour partager vos informations avec moi. Comment ? Nuncius, cesse donc ces odieuses insinuations ! »
languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"

traits.locale_text: « J'en conviens, c'est une question fascinante d'un point de vue anatomique. Si seulement tout le monde partageait votre soif de connaissance, maîtresse Heydari ! Je compte sur vous pour documenter toute nouvelle trouvaille et pour partager vos informations avec moi. Comment ? Nuncius, cesse donc ces odieuses insinuations ! »

languages.text: "Anatomik açıdan gerçekten de büyüleyici bir soru. Keşke herkes sizin bu bilimsel ilginizi paylaşsaydı Üstat Heydari! Umarım bulgularınızı ayrıntılı olarak kaydeder ve benimle paylaşırsınız. Ne? Nuncius, iğrenç imalarından vazgeç artık!"
languages.original_text: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"
